proposal_summary: A proposal to implement the 1 basis point (1bp) / 1 tick fee tier on Polygon, serving as the first Uniswap cross-chain governance proposal utilizing the Fx-Portal messaging mechanism between Ethereum and Polygon.

disclosed_entities.name: Uniswap
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: Uniswap has four deployments: Ethereum, Abritrum, Optimism, and Polygon.

disclosed_entities.name: FxRoot
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: Every governance proposal targeting a change on Polygon should set the FxRoot on Ethereum as the target

disclosed_entities.name: Ethereum Proxy contract
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: The owner of the Uniswap v3 contracts on Polygon is the Ethereum Proxy contract.

disclosed_entities.name: Timelock contract
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: transactions that originate from the Timelock contract on Ethereum

disclosed_entities.name: Uniswap Governor Alpha
disclosed_entities.textual_evidence: To build the proposal–Uniswap Governor Alpha

disclosed_addresses.textual_evidence: The owner of the Uniswap v3 contracts on Polygon is the Ethereum Proxy contract
set the FxRoot on Ethereum as the target

claimed_actions.raw_action: Enable 1 basis point/1 tick fee tier on Polygon
claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Increases available fee tiers for Uniswap pools on Polygon.
claimed_actions.textual_evidence: we are implementing the 1 basis point/1 tick fee tier on Polygon... Datas: [Uniswap Factory contract–enableFeeAmount(100,1)]

claimed_actions.claimed_effect: Sends a message from Ethereum to Polygon FxChild.
claimed_actions.textual_evidence: Messages can be sent from Ethereum to Polygon by calling the sendMessageToChild(address, bytes) at the FxRoot contract

claimed_complexity.reason: It involves deploying cross-chain messaging capabilities to manage parameters on another network via a proxy mechanism.
claimed_complexity.textual_evidence: first Uniswap cross-chain proposal... The message passed through the FxRoot must contain the target(s) contract on Polygon, the function(s) to call, the call data(s)

disclosed_functions.textual_evidence: calling the sendMessageToChild(address, bytes) at the FxRoot contract
